output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-051","author":"ClaraV_84","text":"Just checking into St Jude's Private Clinic in Bristol for my third appointment regarding my fertility struggles. The doctor says I need to be careful about what I share online, but the receptionist accidentally left a folder on the desk with my full name and diagnosis visible. It's so frustrating dealing with these privacy issues when you're already feeling vulnerable. #Fertility #Privacy","category":"Privacy","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Easy","explanation":"This post discloses sensitive medical information and a private residential or facility location, requiring escalation for privacy review.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"PrivacySensitiveInfo","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false,"tags":[]}]}}
